PotatoMaker third-party software notices
========================================

The following libraries are included with PotatoMaker and remain subject to
their own licenses.

FFMpegCore 5.4.0
----------------
Copyright (c) the FFMpegCore contributors.
License: MIT
Source: https://github.com/rosenbjerg/FFMpegCore/tree/ed8f899d04a1f71c481e02b2123176d5cd097a4a
License text: licenses/FFMpegCore-MIT.txt

LibVLCSharp and LibVLCSharp.Avalonia 3.9.6
-----------------------------------------
Copyright (c) the VideoLAN and LibVLCSharp contributors.
License: GNU Lesser General Public License version 2.1 or later.
Source: https://github.com/videolan/LibVLCSharp/tree/4badd9ff352cc0824a3eafd20c7e660a89bba879
License text: licenses/LGPL-2.1.txt
